fields.name: device
DISPENSER
flags
triggers when
use cooldown:seconds#The number of seconds that must elapse before this dispenser is usable
abandonment time:seconds#When abandoned for this many seconds the object will be deleted
max quota:(between 0 and 8)#The maximum number of objects that can come from this dispenser
unrealized potential
interaction hold time:seconds#How many seconds the user must hold the interaction button before the dispenser triggers
interaction screen#A cui_screen to display when someone is using "interaction held"-type dispensers
dispensed object#This object will be spawned by the dispenser
desired variant name#The model variant to use of the dispensed object
action string#This interaction text will display when usable
same team denial string#Displayed when a player is in range but not on the right team
disabled denial string#Displayed when the dispenser is disabled
use cooldown denial string#Displayed when the use cooldown time hasn't elapsed yet
max quota denial string#Displayed when this dispenser is out of charges
interaction in progress denial string#Displayed when someone is already interacting with this device
spawn marker name#The dispensed object will appear with this marker's position and orientation
effect marker name#Creates the dispense effect at this marker name
dispense effect#An effect created when the the dispenser dispenses something
dispenser attach marker#The marker on the dispenser to use for attachment if we attach our dispensed object, origin if undefined
dispensed object attach marker#The marker on the dispensed object to use for attachment if we attach our dispensed object, origin if undefined

options: automated functionality#Turn this on to allow device users to automatically enter vehicles, or automatically equip a weapon
item inherits dispenser team#The spawned object will inherit the dispenser's team
monitor for death only#Spawned objects don't get abandoned, and only reset on death
delete dispensed objects when grabbed in forge#Used for Dominion turrets that are always supposed to be visually attached to their bases
push players clear#Dispenser waits till the dispense location is clear before dispensing and can push players off the dispenser pad
